# ctyun_sdwan_acl_rules (Data Source)
-> 详细说明请见文档：https://www.ctyun.cn/document/10035786/10035852



## Example

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ctyun = {
      source = "ctyun-it/ctyun"
    }
  }
}

# 可参考index.md，在环境变量中配置ak、sk、资源池ID、可用区名称
provider "ctyun" {
  env = "prod"
}

data "ctyun_sdwan_acl_rules" "acl_rules_test" {
  acl_id = "aclid_xxxx"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `acl_id` (String) ACL ID

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `rules` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rules))

<a id="nestedatt--rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules`

Read-Only:

- `action` (String) 策略类型
- `direction` (String) 控制方向
- `dst_cidr` (String) 目的网段
- `dst_port_range` (String) 目的端口范围
- `id` (String) 规则ID
- `priority` (Number) 优先级
- `protocol` (String) 协议类型
- `src_cidr` (String) 源网段
- `src_port_range` (String) 源端口范围
- `status` (String) 状态
